# Axios Full Specification

## Core Loader
`local Axios = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://load.axios.x5i.ch"))()`

## Docs

https://docs.axios.x5i.ch/

## Quick Start Pattern
```lua
Axios:Init()
Axios:Connect(function()
    Axios.Window({"Title"})
        if Axios.Button({"Click"}).clicked() then print("Hi") end
    Axios.End()
end)
```

## State Management (`Axios.State`)
- `Axios.State(initialValue)`: Persistent reactive value by ID.
- `Axios.WeakState(initialValue)`: Resets when disconnected from widgets.
- `Axios.VariableState(var, cb)`: Syncs with a local variable.
- `Axios.TableState(tbl, key, cb?)`: Syncs with a table key.
- `Axios.ComputedState(state, transform)`: Derived from another state.

## Core API Reference

- `Axios:Init(parent?, event?, allowMultiple?)`: Always call first.
- `Axios:Connect(callback)`: Hooks render loop.
- `Axios.End()`: Mandatory closer for containers.
- `Axios.Shutdown()`: Total cleanup.
- `Axios.Append(instance)`: Inject raw GUI instance.
- `Axios.PushConfig(delta)` / `Axios.PopConfig()`: Scoped styling.
- `Axios.PushId(id)` / `Axios.PopId()`: Loop iteration identity.
- `Axios.SetNextWidgetID(id)`: Force next widget ID.

## Widget Catalog

### Containers (Must use `Axios.End()`)
- `Window({title, ...}, {states})`: Root widget.
- `MenuBar()`: Window top bar context.
- `Menu({label})`: Dropdown in menu bar or other menus.
- `Tree({label}, {states})`: Collapsable node.
- `CollapsingHeader({label})`: Styled tree header.
- `TabBar()`: Horizontal tab container.
- `Tab({label}, {states})`: Individual tab.
- `Group()`: Layout grouping.
- `Table({numCols, header, borders...}, {states})`: Grid layout.
- `Indent(width?)`: Horizontal offset.
- `SameLine(offset?, spacing?)`: Prevent new row.

### Clickables
- `Button({text, size})`: Standard button.
- `SmallButton({text, size})`: Compact, no padding.
- `Checkbox({label}, {isChecked})`: Boolean toggle.
- `RadioButton({label, index}, {indexState})`: Multi-choice circles.
- `MenuItem({text, keycode, modifiers})`: In-menu button.
- `MenuToggle({text}, {isChecked})`: In-menu toggle.

### Text & Media
- `Text({text, wrapped, color, richText})`: Shared label.
- `SeparatorText({text})`: Section header line.
- `InputText({label, hint, ...}, {text})`: Box for typing.
- `Image({id, size, ...})`: Texture display.
- `ImageButton({id, size, ...})`: Clickable texture.

### Numeric Inputs (Typed)
- Supports: `Num`, `Vector2`, `Vector3`, `UDim`, `UDim2`, `Rect`, `Color3`, `Color4`.
- `Input[Type]({label, ...}, {number/color})`: Text box input.
- `Drag[Type]({label, ...}, {number/color})`: Drag-to-change.
- `Slider[Type]({label, ...}, {number/color})`: Constrained slider.

### Selection
- `Selectable({text, index}, {indexState})`: List item.
- `Combo({label}, {indexState})`: `HasChildren` dropdown.
- `ComboArray({label}, {indexState}, array)`: Auto-populated list.
- `ComboEnum({label}, {indexState}, Enum)`: Auto-populated enum.

### Visualizers
- `ProgressBar({label, ...}, {progress})`: 0-1 bar.
- `PlotLines({label, ...}, {values})`: Line graph.
- `PlotHistogram({label, ...}, {values})`: Bar chart.

## Properties
- `Axios.Disabled`: Freeze render loop when true.
- `Axios.Args`: Named argument metadata.
- `Axios.Internal`: Low-level backend access.
